merged_prs.title: Implement Phase 2 Muon HLT validation
Allowing Cluster Splitting with HLT Vertices
Disable 2022/2023 MC Tests
Do not use default-constructed PortableCollections
Use #include <...> for external headers
Constrain the TriggerObject template constructors

Remove the explicit dependency on non-alpaka main library

Optimise muon seed MVA classifier
Update HSCParticle object to be compatible with MiniAOD
add DQM / Validation monitoring for `hltInitialStep` and  `hltHighPtTriplet` tracks in the Phase2 HLT menu

Addition of single iteration Patatrack and LST HLT configurations and workflows
LST algorithm developments accumulated during integration PR
Fix to LST code due to uninitialization of the shiftedRt2 variable
fix `CaloParticle` class version after #46678
VarParsing: prevent TypeError for default of int/float/bool list

Use `TriggerResultsFilterFromDB` instead of `HLTHighLevel`,  in order to allow prescaled HLT paths in `EcalESAlign` and `HcalCalIterativePhiSym`
`TriggerResultsFilterFromDB`: accept all triggers paths in presence of an empty list of expressions
MTD reconstruction: save correct outermost hit position also for tracks w/o last hit in mtd
Add time to HGCAL CaloParticles
